paper_title: Exploring the limits of transfer learning with a unified text-to-text transformer

extraction_data.pretraining_task: The main pre-training objective is to predict the next token in a sequence given the previous tokens.
extraction_data.innovation: The main innovation of the T5 model is its ability to adapt to various tasks through a single pre-training objective. The model uses a text-to-text transformer architecture, allowing it to learn from both unlabelled and labelled data. This approach enables efficient multitask learning and improves overall performance across different NLP tasks.
